questionHtml: Sketch a Voronoi diagram showing the regions within the metropolitan area that are closest to each town.
markschemeHtml:
A1


Note: There is no need for a scale / coordinates here. Condone boundaries extending beyond the metropolitan area.

 

[1 mark]
